zh.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Co: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Soule於1671年8月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯時，他的父親George Soule II32歲，母親Deborah Thomas24歲。他於大約1691年與Hannah在美國麻薩諸塞州結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1723年4月25日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Soule于1671年8月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯时，他的父亲George Soule II32岁，母亲Deborah Thomas24岁。他于大约1691年与Hannah在美国马萨诸塞州结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1723年4月25日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Soule
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): of Norman origin, a variant of   Soul  .

French (Soulé): topographic name for someone who lived in a house exposed to sun, a variant of Soulier 2; or a habitational name from Soulé, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France.
History: George Soule (1600–80), one of the passengers on the Mayflower in 1620, was one of the founders of Duxbury, MA, where he became comparatively wealthy. He left eight children.

variants.name: Sowle
meanings: English: variant of   Soule  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Soul
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Soules near Saint-Lô (Manche, France).
French (mainly Manche): variant of Saoul, a nickname from saoul ‘full, satiated; drunk’, figuratively also ‘surfeited with something’.

History: The Scottish family of this name traces the name back to Ranulf de Soulis (died before 1170), a Norman knight who came to Scotland with King David I and served as his cupbearer. Sir John Soulis (died before 1310) was appointed ‘guardian of Scotland’ by John Balliol in 1301.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Soule was born on 28 August 1671, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, George Soule II, was 32 and his mother, Deborah Thomas, was 24. He married Hannah about 1691, in Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 25 April 1723, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Soule est né le 28 août 1671, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Soule II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Deborah Thomas, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Hannah environ 1691, à Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1723, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Soule am 28. August 1671 in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Soule II 32 und seine Mutter Deborah Thomas 24. Er hat um 1691 in Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Hannah geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 25. April 1723 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Soule è nato il il 28 agosto 1671 nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, George Soule II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Deborah Thomas, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Hannah circa 1691, nel Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 25 aprile 1723, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Souleが1671年8月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで生まれた時，父George Soule IIは32歳，母Deborah Thomasは24歳であった。約1691年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州でHannahと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1723年4月25日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Soule(이)가 1671년 8월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Soule II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Deborah Thomas(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1691년 미국 매사추세츠 주에서 Hannah(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1723년 4월 25일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Soule nasceu em 28 de agosto de 1671, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, George Soule II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Deborah Thomas, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah aproximadamente 1691, em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1723, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Soule родился 28 августа 1671 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени George Soule II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Deborah Thomas, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah около 1691 г. в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 25 апреля 1723 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Soule nació el 28 de agosto de 1671, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, George Soule II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Deborah Thomas, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Hannah aproximadamente 1691, en Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 25 de abril de 1723, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
